brand_identity.name: NVP Labs
brand_identity.core_aesthetic: Premium, minimal, futuristic, high-end luxury. Inspired by Apple, Vercel, Stripe, Framer, and Linear.

typography.strategy: Avoid Inter. Use distinct premium fonts.

typography_scale.h1: text-5xl sm:text-6xl md:text-7xl lg:text-[5rem] font-bold tracking-tighter leading-none
typography_scale.small_caps: text-xs sm:text-sm text-muted-foreground uppercase tracking-[0.2em] font-medium

liquid_glass_button.description: Apple/Vercel inspired premium glass button with shine, reflection, and magnetic feel.
liquid_glass_button.classes: relative overflow-hidden backdrop-blur-xl border transition-all duration-300 hover:scale-105 active:scale-95 group rounded-full px-6 py-3 font-medium
liquid_glass_button.hover_effect: before:absolute before:inset-0 before:bg-gradient-to-r before:from-transparent before:via-white/20 before:to-transparent before:-translate-x-full hover:before:animate-[shimmer_1.5s_infinite]

glassmorphism_cards.description: Frosted glass cards with premium 1px borders and subtle ambient shadows.
glassmorphism_cards.classes: backdrop-blur-2xl rounded-2xl border transition-all duration-500 hover:-translate-y-1 overflow-hidden p-8

navigation.description: Sticky nav with heavy blur that shrinks on scroll.
navigation.classes: fixed top-0 left-0 right-0 z-50 backdrop-blur-2xl border-b transition-all duration-300

animations.page_transition: Framer Motion: fade in, slightly slide up (y: 20 -> 0), ease-out.
animations.scroll: Lenis for buttery smooth scrolling is MANDATORY.
animations.reveal: GSAP or Framer Motion staggered upward reveal for grids/cards. Use viewportOnce.
animations.hero_particles: Subtle, floating particles via TSParticles or customized Framer Motion elements. High-end look, avoid dense noisy particles.
animations.magnetic_cursor: Custom floating cursor blending inverse colors over text/buttons.

layout_spacing.container: w-full max-w-7xl mx-auto px-6 md:px-12 lg:px-16
layout_spacing.grid_standard: grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-3 gap-6 md:gap-8 lg:gap-12
layout_spacing.bento_grid: Use asymmetric col-span and row-span. Wide gaps (gap-8). Essential for 'Services' and 'Portfolio' sections.
layout_spacing.whitespace_rule: Embrace negative space. Elements should have generous breathing room (mb-20, mb-32 between major sections).

hero_backgrounds.description: Dark abstract tech luxury background, suitable for hero particle overlay.

team_testimonials.description: High-end black-and-white team portrait for About or Careers page.
Professional women in consulting, good for Testimonials.

portfolio_dashboards.description: Software analytics dashboard mockup, great for Portfolio.
Clean software UI mockup in dark mode.

technical_instructions.testing: CRITICAL: All interactive elements (buttons, nav links, form inputs, toggles, filter chips) MUST include a 'data-testid' attribute in kebab-case. Example: data-testid='hero-cta-button'.
technical_instructions.theme_logic: Implement animated theme toggle (light/dark mode) using React Context. Store preference in localStorage and support system default. Apply 'dark' class to the HTML root.
technical_instructions.routing: Setup routing for: Home, Services, Portfolio, Products, Pricing, About, Careers, Blog, Contact, Client Login, Admin CMS.
technical_instructions.advanced_features: Include a WhatsApp floating action button (z-[100]), Cookie consent banner (glassmorphic), and Book Consultation / Project Cost Calculator modal.
technical_instructions.icons: Use lucide-react. Keep stroke-width low (1.5) for a sharper, premium tech feel.
